questions.title: Для чего используется v-model?

{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"v-model"},{"type":"text","text":" — это директива Vue для "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"двусторонней привязки данных"},{"type":"text","text":"."},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"text","text":"Она связывает значение в шаблоне (input, select, textarea, компонент) с переменной в состоянии, так что "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"обновление значения в DOM меняет данные"},{"type":"text","text":", и "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"обновление данных меняет DOM"},{"type":"text","text":"."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Простыми словами:"}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"v-model"},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":" синхронизирует данные и интерфейс автоматически."}]}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🔥 Как работает "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"v-model"},{"type":"text","text":" (на примере input)"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"html"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"<input v-model="name">
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Это "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"синтаксический сахар"},{"type":"text","text":" для:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"html"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"<input
  :value="name"
  @input="name = $event.target.value"
/>
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"То есть Vue сам делает "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"v-bind"},{"type":"text","text":" + "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"v-on"},{"type":"text","text":"."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🔥 Поддержка разных элементов форм"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Текстовые инпуты"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"html"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"<input v-model="text">
"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Чекбокс"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"html"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"<input type="checkbox" v-model="checked">
"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Радиокнопки"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"html"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"<input type="radio" value="A" v-model="choice">
<input type="radio" value="B" v-model="choice">
"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Select"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"html"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"<select v-model="selected">
  <option value="1">One</option>
</select>
"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Чекбоксы с массивами"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"html"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"<input type="checkbox" value="A" v-model="selectedItems">
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Если чекбокс включён → "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"value"},{"type":"text","text":" добавляется в массив."},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"text","text":"Если выключен → значение удаляется."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🔥 Модификаторы v-model"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":".trim"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Автоматически удаляет пробелы по краям"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"html"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"<input v-model.trim="name">
"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":".number"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Преобразует значение в число"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"html"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"<input v-model.number="age">
"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":".lazy"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Срабатывает при "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"change"},{"type":"text","text":", а не при "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"input"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"html"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"<input v-model.lazy="value">
"}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🔥 v-model в компонентах (очень важная тема)"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"В Vue 3:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"html"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"<MyInput v-model="username" />
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Vue интерпретирует это как:"}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"передать проп "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"modelValue"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"слушать событие "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"update:modelValue"}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Пример компонента:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"vue"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"<script>
export default {
  props: {
    modelValue: String
  },
  emits: ['update:modelValue']
}
</script>

<template>
  <input 
    :value="modelValue" 
    @input="$emit('update:modelValue', $event.target.value)"
  >
</template>
"}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🔥 Именованные модели (Vue 3)"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Можно иметь несколько "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"v-model"},{"type":"text","text":" в одном компоненте:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"html"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"<DatePicker v-model:start="startDate" v-model:end="endDate" />
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Компонент должен работать с "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"modelValue"},{"type":"text","text":" заменённым на аргумент:"}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"проп: "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"start"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"событие: "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"update:start"}]}]}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🔥 Как работает v-model "под капотом""}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Каждый "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"v-model"},{"type":"text","text":" превращается в комбинацию:"}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"v-bind"},{"type":"text","text":" для передачи значения"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"v-on"},{"type":"text","text":" для обновления данных"}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"То есть фактически это:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":":prop="value"  
@event="value = $event""}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null}}]}
